home.title: Webfudge Platform
home.description: A modular business operating system — CRM, project management, accounts, finance, and vendor workflows in one connected monorepo.

callout.title: UI-first milestone complete
callout.body: The documentation shell is live. Upload README.md files from the admin panel to populate pages dynamically.

blocks.text: Platform documentation is managed through the Admin panel — accessible to Super Admins and Admins. Upload a README.md for any app, set the application, category, and status to published. The page will appear in the sidebar automatically.

systemOverview.title: System Overview
systemOverview.description: Multiple Next.js workspace apps sharing one Strapi API backend, each serving a different business function.

crm.name: Fudge Grow
crm.tagline: CRM — Sales workspace for leads, deals, contacts, and proposals
crm.description: Fudge Grow is a powerful, modern CRM workspace specifically engineered for high-velocity sales teams. It centralizes your entire sales operation, empowering you to seamlessly manage incoming leads, track active deals across custom pipeline stages, and maintain deep, actionable relationships with client accounts. With built-in tools for automated proposal generation, comprehensive contact profiling, and real-time sales forecasting, Fudge Grow eliminates friction in the sales process so your team can focus entirely on closing more business and driving revenue growth.

features.title: Sales Pipeline

pm.name: Fudge Flow
pm.tagline: PM — Project delivery workspace for tasks, calendar, and collaboration
pm.description: Fudge Flow is a modern project delivery workspace built for teams that need clarity from kickoff to handoff. It brings project planning, task ownership, milestones, calendars, and team communication into one shared operating surface, helping managers understand progress in real time while giving contributors a clear view of priorities, blockers, and deadlines. With structured workflows for planning, collaboration, time tracking, and delivery visibility, Fudge Flow keeps teams aligned so work moves forward predictably and projects ship on time.

accounts.name: Fudge Base
accounts.tagline: Accounts — Organization administration for users, roles, and billing
accounts.description: Fudge Base is the secure administration workspace that anchors the Webfudge platform. It gives operations and admin teams one place to manage users, organizations, departments, roles, permissions, security policies, billing, and audit activity across every connected app. By centralizing identity, access control, subscription settings, and compliance visibility, Fudge Base helps teams keep their workspace organized, protected, and ready to scale as more products and users come online.
